zh.lifeSummary: 當William Calverley於1246年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親William Scot de Calverley36歲，母親Mabel Stapleton51歲。他於1272年與Constance de Brus of Walton在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1274年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Calverley was born in 1246, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Scot de Calverley, was 36 and his mother, Mabel Stapleton, was 51. He married Constance de Brus of Walton in 1272, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 1274, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: William Calverley(이)가 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Scot de Calverley(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Stapleton(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Constance de Brus of Walton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1274년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 사망했다.
